WITN09250100
WITN09250100

Witness Name: Paul Graham Bosson
Statement No.: WITN09250100
Dated: 13th June 2023

POST OFFICE HORIZON IT INQUIRY

FIRST WITNESS STATEMENT OF PAUL GRAHAM BOSSON

I, Paul Graham Bosson, will say as follow:-

Introduction

1. I am a former employee of Post Office Limited and held the position of Network Audit Manager.

2. This witness statement is made to assist the Post Office Horizon IT Inquiry (the "Inquiry") with the matters set out in the Rule 9 Request dated 15th May 2023 (the "Request").

Background

3. I joined the Post Office straight from school in 1977 where I worked for 2 years at the Crown Office in Reading.
